title: brachyscome radicata var. membranifolia
intro: Brachyscome radicata var. membranifolia, also known as the Tasmanian button daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Tasmania. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive discomfort. Herbal preparations of Brachyscome radicata var. membranifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
